rulings.Case Title: HEGYI VS 2555 LEAVENWORTH STREET
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT 2555 LEAVENWORTH STREET APARTMENTS INC.'S DEMURRER -- Overruled, as to the 1st and 4th cause of action. sustained with leave to amend as to 2nd cause of action as follows language in re personal injury claim is sufficient needs to allege facts showing discovery of property damage claim within 3 years of complaint. Sustained with leave to amend as to 3rd cause of action as follows language as to defendants except Bohan is sufficient re CC&R's but need to show how defendant Bohan Co. is party to CC&R's. (REQ/302/RS)
